CustomField.formula: IF(LEFT(TEXT(SBQQ__Quote__r.NATT_Unit__c) ,3) = "Sup", IF( NATT_Engine_Hours_Year__c > 2000, 2000, NATT_Engine_Hours_Year__c), IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(NATT_Oil_Type__c, "Synthetic"), NATT_Engine_Hours_Year__c * 2 > 4000), 4000, IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(NATT_Oil_Type__c,"Mineral"), NATT_Engine_Hours_Year__c * 2 > 3000), 3000, NATT_Engine_Hours_Year__c * 2) ) )
CustomField.label: zDeleteOil Change Interval (Eng Hrs)
